module_interpretations.meaning: Mitochondrial energy metabolism and respiratory chain
module_interpretations.evidence: GSEA: mitochondrial respiratory chain complex assembly NES=-2.80, mitochondrial translation NES=-2.71
ECM score r=+0.69 strongest correlation; first round GO: cardiac muscle terms
ECM score r=-0.43; atrium_shared_up overlap from round 1

convergent_evolution: Turquoise module enriches mitochondrial energy pathways specifically in high-heart-rate species. This is biologically coherent: high heart rates require high ATP production. ECM remodeling (green positive, brown negative) suggests dual structural adaptation. Signed network confirms turquoise is not an unsigned artifact (persists with 7 modules).
limitations: ECM score from GO annotation only
Signed network gene-level overlap with unsigned not quantified
